problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Casimir. Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
